title: hook 최적화 증분3: 실제 플러그인 hook(src/hooks/* → bin/ditto hook)을 rebuild/ 설계로 재배선 — 계약
source_request: hook 최적화 증분 3: 실제 플러그인 hook을 재구축 rebuild/ 설계로 재배선. rebuild/hook은 Stop 훅 하나뿐이고 계약이 실제 플러그인 Stop 게이트 계약과 다르므로, 무엇을 어느 계약으로 이관할지 매핑을 설계-먼저로 심의 후 진행. 우선순위: 컨텍스트/토큰 절감 · 실행 오버헤드 절감 · 게이트 정확성 · 코드 단순화. 내부 동작은 영어, 사용자 출력은 한국어. 증분 2(옛 핸들러 in-place 슬림화)는 보류.
goal: Rewire all 6 live plugin hook events (SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreCompact, Stop) from the legacy src/hooks handlers onto rebuild-design thin handlers, Claude-Code-only, preserving DECISION parity (every observable blocking decision of the current gates), with measured token-injection and process-overhead reduction on the two heavy events.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Zero hook events still routed through the old handler layer: each of the 6 events is rewired to a rebuild-contract handler or consolidated/retired by the recorded design mapping; routing is reversible and one rollback flip is verified.

evidence.command:
bash -c set -e
# rollback flip: default(rebuilt) blocks, legacy flag blocks, unset rebuilt again; routing identity tests prove which table serves
echo "{\"tool_name\":\"Bash\",\"tool_input\":{\"command\":\"rm -rf /\"}}" | bun bin/ditto hook pre-tool-use && exit 1 || [ $? -eq 2 ]
echo "{\"tool_name\":\"Bash\",\"tool_input\":{\"command\":\"rm -rf /\"}}" | DITTO_HOOKS_LEGACY=1 bun bin/ditto hook pre-tool-use && exit 1 || [ $? -eq 2 ]
bun test src/hooks/rebuilt/hook-routing.test.ts 2>&1 | tail -3
git diff --quiet HEAD -- hooks/hooks.json
echo AC1-OK

acceptance_criteria.statement: Decision parity holds: every observable blocking decision of the current PreToolUse and Stop gates is preserved, evidenced by characterization/parity tests created before rewiring (PreToolUse inline logic) and by reuse of the pure gate library (Stop); fail-open crash semantics and the stop loop guard are preserved.

evidence.command:
bash -c set -e
bun test src/hooks/ 2>&1 | tail -3
DITTO_HOOKS_LEGACY=1 bun test src/hooks/ 2>&1 | tail -3
grep -q "~/core/gates" src/hooks/rebuilt/stop-gate.ts
echo AC2-OK

acceptance_criteria.statement: Before/after measurements of injected tokens and hook process overhead on the two heavy events are recorded and reported honestly, including a near-zero delta if that is the outcome.
The new hooks demonstrably fire in one live session in this repo (live-fire check).
The dual-host supersede is recorded as an ADR in this work item, the new hook command fails loudly (non-zero) on --host codex, and Codex-surface removal exists as a tracked follow-up work item.

evidence.command:
bash -c set -e
test -f .ditto/knowledge/adr/ADR-20260722-claude-code-only-host.md
grep -q "superseded by ADR-20260722-claude-code-only-host" .ditto/knowledge/adr/ADR-0016-dual-host-claude-codex.md
bun bin/ditto hook pre-tool-use --host codex < /dev/null && exit 1 || [ $? -eq 2 ]
gh issue view 70 --repo incognito050924/ditto --json state --jq .state | grep -q OPEN
echo AC5-OK

re_entry.command: # resolve the land blocker, then re-run: ditto autopilot complete --workItem wi_260722esa
